creator: vendion@gmail.com
text:
Following the recommendation posted by the upstream author here https://github.com/qutebrowser/qutebrowser/issues/5773#issuecomment-704944886 this is a bug in QT/QtWebEngine 5.15.0. As such I commented out that setting in my config and it seems to be working so far.

It appears an this is fixed it QT 5.15.1, as such it is probably safe to close this issue.
